title: Impact Notification Service Design
summary: Technical design for an event-driven impact notification service that fires subscriber callbacks after spec changelog commits.
notes: Path is docs/superpowers/specs/ and file has Status: Draft plus a Decision Summary table, giving it ADR-like flavor, but it lacks a numbered ADR filename and 'Context/Decision/Consequences' structure; content is dominated by interface definitions, architecture, file-change lists, and test plans (implementation contract), so classified as SPEC over ADR/PRD.
